question:
In what ratio must a grocer mix two varieties of pulses costing Rs.69 and Rs.92
per kg respectively so as to get a mixture worth Rs.79.5 per kg?
एक दकु ानदाय कॉ 69 रुऩम े औय 92 रुऩम े प्रति ककरॉग्राभ की कीभि ऱारी दॉ ककस्मों की दारों कॉ
ककऴ अनुऩाि भें मभराना चाहवए िाकक उऴ े 79.5 रुऩमे प्रति ककरॉग्राभ का मभश्रण प्राप्त वॉ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
In what ratio should talcum powder A costing Rs. 3.20 per kg be mixed with
talcum powder B costing Rs. 2.90 per kg so that the cost price of the mixture
becomes Rs. 3.8 per kg?
3 रुऩमे 20 ऩैऴ े प्रति ककरॉ ग्राभ की टेरकभ ऩाउडय A कॉ 2 रुऩमे 90 ऩैऴ े प्रति ककरॉ ग्राभ के
टेरकभ ऩाउडय B के ऴाथ ककऴ अनुऩाि भें मभरामा जामें िाकक मभश्रण की रागि भूल्य 3 रुऩम े 8
ऩैऴे प्रति ककरॉग्राभ वॉ जाए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
To obtain a mixture valued at ₹205.50 per kg, in what ratio should a grocer
combine two types of pulses that cost ₹203 per kg and ₹215 per kg, respectively?
₹205.50 प्रति ककरॉग्राभ भूल्य का मभश्रण प्राप्त कयने के मरए, एक ककयाने ऱारे कॉ दॉ प्रकाय की
दारों कॉ ककऴ अनुऩाि भें मभराना चाहवए मजनकी कीभि क्रभलः ₹203 प्रति ककरॉग्राभ औय ₹215
प्रति ककरॉग्राभ वै?
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
In what ratio should sugar costing ₹83 per kg be mixed with sugar costing ₹46
per kg so that by selling the mixture at ₹80.3 per kg, there is a profit of 46%?
₹83 प्रति kg ऱारी चीनी कॉ ₹46 प्रति kg ऱारी चीनी के ऴाथ ककऴ अनुऩाि भें मभरामा जाना
चाहवए िाकक मभश्रण कॉ ₹80.3 प्रति kg ऩय फेचने ऩय 46% का राब वॉ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Find the ratio in which a mixture costing Rs 192 per kg should be mixed with
another mixture costing Rs 150 per kg so that the final mixture when sold at Rs
194.40 per kg gives a profit of 20 per cent?
उऴ अनुऩाि कॉ ज्ञाि कय,ें मजऴभें एक 192 रुऩमे प्रति ककग्रा. कीभि ऱारी मभश्रण कॉ 150 रुऩमे प्रति
ककग्रा. कीभि ऱारी मभश्रण के ऴाथ इऴ ियव मभरामा जाम े िाकक जफ अंतिभ मभश्रण कॉ 194.40
रुऩमे प्रति ककग्रा. ऩय फेचा जामे, िॉ 20 प्रतिलि का भुनापा दे?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
How many kilograms of rice costing ₹70/kg must be mixed with 63 kg of rice
costing ₹90/kg so that there may be a gain of 15% by selling the mixture at
₹96.60/kg?
₹70/ककग्रा कीभि ऱारे ककिने ककरॉग्राभ चाऱर कॉ ₹90/ककग्रा कीभि ऱारे 63 ककरॉग्राभ चाऱर
के ऴाथ मभरामा जाना चाहवए िाकक मभश्रण कॉ ₹96.60/ककग्रा ऩय फेचने ऩय 15% का राब वॉ ऴके ?
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Sri Ganesh bought 40 kg of wheat at Rs.12.50 per kg and 25 kg at Rs.15.10 per kg. He
mixed them together. At what rate should he sell the mixture to earn 10% profit?
श्री गणेल ने 40 ककरॉग्राभ गेरॄूँ 12.50 रुऩमे प्रति ककरॉ औय 25 ककरॉग्राभ गेरॄं 15.10 रुऩमे प्रति
ककरॉ के हवऴाफ ऴे खयीदा। उऴने उन्हें एक ऴाथ मभरा ददमा। 10% राब अमजिि कयने के मरए उऴ े
ककऴ दय ऩय मभश्रण फेचना चाहवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A person spent Rs. 50000 to purchase a desktop computer and a laptop
computer. He sold the desktop at 20% profit and the laptop at 10% loss. If overall
he made a 2% profit then the purchase price, in rupees, of the desktop is
एक व्यक्ति ने एक डेस्कटॉऩ कं प्यूटय औय एक रैऩटॉऩ कं प्यूटय खयीदने के मरए 50000 रुऩमे खचच
ककए। उऴने डेस्कटॉऩ कॉ 20% राब ऩय औय रैऩटॉऩ कॉ 10% वामन ऩय फेचा। अगय कु र मभराकय
उऴने 2% का राब कभामा वै, िॉ डेस्कटॉऩ का खयीद भूल्य,( रुऩए भें), वै
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A person bought a horse and a carriage for ₹72,000. He sold the horse at a profit
of 12% and the carriage at a loss of 7.5%, there by gaining 3.875% on the whole
transaction. What was the cost of the horse?
एक व्यक्ति ने ₹72,000 भें एक घॉडा औय एक गाडी खयीदी। उऴने घॉडे कॉ 12% के राब ऩय औय गाडी
कॉ 7.5% की वामन ऩय फचे ददमा, औय ऩुय े ऴॊदे ऩय उऴकॉ 3.875% का राब रृआ। घॉडे का क्रम भल्यू
ककिना था?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Govind bought two items at a total cost of ₹4,800. He sold one item at 34% profit
and the other at 10% loss. If Govind sold both the items together for ₹5,442, then
what is the difference between the cost price (in ₹) of both the items?
गॉकऱिंद ने ₹4,800 के कु र क्रम भूल्य ऩय दॉ ऱस्तुएं खयीदीं। उऴने एक ऱस्तु कॉ 34% राब ऩय औय
दऴू यी कॉ 10% वामन ऩय फेचा। मदद गॉकऱिंद ने दॉनों ऱस्तुओ ंकॉ कु र ₹5,442 भें फेचा, िॉ दॉनों ऱस्तओु ं
के क्रम भूल्यों का अंिय (₹ भें) ज्ञाि कीमजए।
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The average pass percentage of girls in class X examination in a school is 85% and that
of boys is 83%. The average pass percentage of all and girls in class X of that school is
83.7%. Find the percentage of the number of girls in class X of that school.
एक स्कू र भें दऴऱीं कक्षा की ऩयीक्षा भें रडककमाूँ कय औऴि उत्तीणच प्रतिलि 85 % औय रडकों का
83% वै। उऴ स्कू र के दऴऱीं कक्षा के ऴबी रडकों औय रडककमों का औऴि उत्तीणच प्रतिलि 83.7% वै।
उऴ स्कू र की दऴऱीं कक्षा भें रडककमों की ऴंख्या का प्रतिलि ज्ञाि ककमजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The average weight of the boys in a class is 69.3 kg and that of the girls in the
same class is 59.4. If the average weight of all the boys and girls in the class is
63.8 kg, then the percentage of the number of boys in the class is:
एक कक्षा भें रडकों का औऴि ऱजन 69.3 ककग्रा वै औय उऴी कक्षा भें रडककमों का औऴि ऱजन
59.4 ककग्रा वै। मदद कक्षा भें ऴबी रडकों औय रडककमों का औऴि ऱनज 63.8 ककग्रा वै, िॉ कक्षा भें
रडकों की ऴंख्या का प्रतिलि ककिना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The average score obtained by 64 boys and a certain number of girls in a test is
59.15, while the average score obtained by the boys is 55.25. If the average score
of the girls is 68.75, then how many girls appeared for the test?
एक ऩयीक्षा भें 64 रडकों औय एक मनमिि ऴख्यं ा भें रडककमों द्वाया प्राप्त औऴि अंक 59.15 वै, जफकक
रडकों द्वाया प्राप्त औऴि अंक 55.25 वै। मदद रडककमों का औऴि स्कॉय 68.75 वै, िॉ ककिनी
रडककमाूँ ऩयीक्षा भें लामभर रृईं?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL CBT-1 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
There are total 120 students in three sections A, B and C of Class 10. The average
marks of the three sections is 85. The average marks of section B and C is 88 and
the average marks of section A is 78. Find the number of students in section A.
कक्षा 10 के िीन अनुबागों A, B औय C भें कु र 120 कऱद्याथी वैं। िीनों अनुबागों के औऴि अंक 85 वैं।
अनुबाग B औय C के औऴि अंक 88 वैं औय अनुबाग A के औऴि अंक 78 वैं। अनुबाग A भें
कऱद्याक्तथिमों की ऴंख्या ज्ञाि कय।ें
[RRB JE 2024]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Several students have taken an exam. There was an error in the answer key
which affected the marks of 48 students, and their average marks reduced from
78 to 66. The average of remaining students increased by 3.5 marks. This
resulted the reduction of the average of all students by 4.5 marks. The number
of students that attended the exam is:
कई छात्रों ने एक ऩयीक्षा दी। उत् िय ऩतत्रका भें एक त्रुहट थी, मजऴने 48 छात्रों के अंकों कॉ प्रबाकऱि
ककमा औय उनके औऴि अंक 78 ऴे घटकय 66 वॉ गए। लेळ छात्रों के औऴि भें 3.5 अंक की ऱृद्धि रृई।
इऴऴ े ऴबी छात्रों के औऴि भ ें 4.5 अकं की कभी रृई। ऩयीक्षा भ ें लामभर वॉन े ऱारे छात्रों की ऴख्ं म ा
क्म ा वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
In a class of 240 students, 37.5% are boys and the remaining are girls. The
average of the boys’ marks is 67.1 and that of the girls is 85.5. What are the
average marks of the whole class?
240 छात्रों की कक्षा भें, 37.5% रडके वैं औय लेळ रडककमां वैं। रडकों के अंकों का औऴि 67.1 औय
रडककमों के अकं ों का औऴि 85.5 वै। ऩूयी कक्षा के औऴि अंक क्या वैं?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
In a company with 600 employees, the average age of the male employees is 42
years and that of the female employees is 41 years. If the average age of all the
employees in the company is 41 years 9 months, then the number of female
employees is:
600 कभचचाहयमों ऱारी कं ऩनी भें, ऩुरुळ कभचच ाहयमों की औऴि आमु 42 ऱळच वै औय भहवरा
कभेचाहयमों की औऴि आमु 41 ऱळच वै। मदद ऴबी कभचचाहयमों की औऴि आमु 41 ऱळच औय 9 भाव वै, िॉ
भहवरा कभचचाहयमों की ऴंख्या फिाइए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
At a health club, 55% of the members are women and 45% of the members are
men. If the average age of the men is 95 years and the average age of the
women is 85 years, what is the average age (in years) of all the members?
एक वेल्थ क्लफ भें 55% ऴदस्य भहवराएं औय 45% ऩुरुळ वैं। मदद ऩुरुळों की औऴि आमु 95 ऱळच औय
भहवराओ ंकी औऴि आमु 85 ऱळच वै, िॉ ऴबी ऴदस्यों की औऴि आमु (ऱळों भें) ककिनी वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The average monthly salary of all the employees in a factory is Rs.8840. If the
average salary of all the officers is Rs.15000 and that of the remaining
employees is Rs.8000 then what is the percentage of the officers among the
employees?
ककऴी पै क्री भें ऴबी कभचचाहयमों का औऴि ऱेिन रू.8840 वै। मदद ऴबी अतधकाहयमों का औऴि
ऱेिन रू.15000 वै औय लेळ कभचचाहयमों का औऴि ऱेिन रू.8000 वै िॉ कभचचाहयमों भें अतधकाहयमों
का प्रतिलि ककिना वै?
(MAINS 2016)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
An army of 12,000 consists of Europeans and Indians. The average height of
Europeans is 70 inches and that of an indian is 69 inches. The average height of
the whole army is inches. Find the number of Indians in the army?
एक ऴेना भें मूयॉकऩमन औय बायिीम ऴैमनक वै मजनकी कु र ऴंख्या 12000 वै।मूयॉकऩमन ऴैमनकों की
औऴि रंफाई 70इंच जफकक बायिीम ऴैमनकों की औऴि रंफाई 69 इंच वै।ऩूयी ऴेना की औऴि
रंफाई वै । ज्ञाि कीमजम े ऴेना भें ककिन े बायिीम ऴैमनक वै।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A trader bought 640 kg of rice. He sold a part of rice at 20% profit and the rest at 5% less.
He earned profit of 15% in the entire transacting. What is the quantity (in kg) of rice that
he sold at 5% loss?
एक कऱक्रे िा ने 640 kg चाऱर खयीदे। उऴने चाऱर का एक बाग 20% राब ऩय फेचा औय लेळ बाग
5% वामन ऩय फेचा। ऩूय े रेनदेन भें उऴे 15% राब रृआ। उऴके द्वाया 5% की वामन ऩय फेचे गए चाऱर की
भात्रा (ककग्रा भें) ज्ञाि कय।ें
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A trader buys 60 bags of grain at the rate of ₹ 400 each. If it sells 18 bags at 8%
profit, at what price should it sell the remaining bags to make a total profit of
16.4% on 60 bags?
एक व्याऩायी 60 फॉयी अनाज ₹ 400 प्रत्येक फॉयी की दय ऩय खयीदिा वै। मदद मव 8% राब ऩय 18
फॉहयमां फेचिा वै, िॉ उऴ े 60 फॉयी ऩय कु र 16.4% राब कभाने के मरए लळे फॉहयमां ककऴ कीभि ऩय
फेचनी चाहवए ?
ALP Tier - 2 23/01/2019 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If a beer of 750ml bottle has 9% Alcohol and a wine bottle of 500 ml has 14%
alcohol in it. If 2 bottles of beer and 3 bottles of wine are mixed together, then
find the percentage of alcohol in the solution?
मदद 750 मभरी की फीमय की फॉिर भें 9% अल्कॉवर वै औय 500 मभरी की ऱाइन की फॉिर भें 14%
अल्कॉवर वै। मदद फीमय की 2 फॉिरें औय ऱाइन की 3 फॉिरें एकऴाथ मभराई जािी वैं, िॉ घॉर भें
अल्कॉवर का प्रतिलि ज्ञाि कीमजमे।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
In an experiment, it was observed that metal A is 19 times heavier than water
and metal B is 9 times heavier than water. In what ratio metal A and B mixed so
that the mixture thus obtained be 15 times heavier than water?
एक प्रमॉग भ,ें मव देखा गमा कक धािु A, ऩानी ऴ े 19 गुना बायी वै औय धाि ु B, ऩानी ऴे 9 गनु ा बायी वै। धािु A
औय B कॉ ककऴ अनुऩाि भ ें मभरामा जाए िाकक इऴ प्रकाय प्राप्त मभश्रण ऩानी ऴ े 15 गुना बायी वॉ?
(SSC CHSL PRE 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
If a dairy mixes cow’s milk which contains 10% fat with buffalo’s milk which
contains 20% fat, then the resulting mixture has fat (120/7)% of fat. What ratio
was the cow’s milk mixed with buffalo’s milk?
कॉई डेमयी गाम का दधू मजऴभें ऱऴा (पै ट) का प्रतिलि 10% वै, कॉ बैंऴ के दधू के ऴाथ मभरािी वैं
मजऴभें 20% ऱऴा वै िॉ ऩहयणाभी मभश्रण भें ऱऴा, ऱऴा का (120/7)% वॉिा वै। गाम का दधू ककऴ
अनुऩाि भें बैंऴ के दधू के ऴाथ मभरामा गमा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Vessel A contains milk and water in the ratio 4 : 5. Vessel B contains milk and
water in the ratio 2 : 1. If x litres mixture of A is mixed with y litres mixture of B,
then the ratio of milk to water in the mixture becomes 8 : 5. Find the ratio x : y.
फिचन A भें दधू औय ऩानी 4 : 5 के अनुऩाि भें वै। फिचन B भें दधू औय ऩानी 2 : 1 के अनुऩाि भें वै। मदद A
का x रीटय मभश्रण B के y रीटय मभश्रण के ऴाथ मभरामा जािा वै, िॉ नए मभश्रण भें दधू औय ऩानी
का अनुऩाि 8 : 5 वॉ जािा वै। अनुऩाि x : y ज्ञाि कीमजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A chemical company has two types of alloys, containing zinc and aluminum in
the ratios 7:22 and 21:37, respectively. In what ratio should these alloys be mixed
to obtain a new alloy in which the ratio of zinc to aluminum is 25:62?
एक यऴामन कम्पनी भें दॉ प्रकाय के मभश्रधािु वैं औय उनभें जस्ता औय एल्मुमनमभ क्रभलः 7: 22 औय
21:37 के अनुऩाि भें वैं। इन मभश्रधािुओ ंकॉ ककऴ अनुऩाि भें मभरामा जाए िाकक एक नई मभश्र धाि ु
फन े मजऴभें जस्ता औय एल्यूमभमनमभ की अनुऩाि 25: 62 भें वॉ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Two alloys contain silver and copper in the ratios 5 : 3 and 6: 5. In what ratio
should the two alloys be added together to get a new alloy having silver and
copper in the ratio of 3:2?
दॉ मभश्र धािुओ ंभें चांदी औय िांफा 5: 3 औय 6: 5 के अनुऩाि भें वैं। चांदी औय िांफे की 3: 2 के अनऩु ाि
भें नई मभश्र धािु प्राप्त कयने के मरए दॉनों मभश्र धािुओ ंकॉ ककऴ अनुऩाि भें जॉडा जाना चाहवए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
In a blend of apple juice and orange juice, 20% was apple juice. In another blend
of the two juices, 30% was orange juice. The two blends are mixed in a certain
ratio so that the ratio of apple juice and orange juice in the mixture was 4 : 3.
Find the ratio of the first blend and the second blend in that order, in the final
mixture.
ऴेफ के यऴ औय ऴंिय े के यऴ ऱारे एक मभश्रण भें, 20% ऴेफ का यऴ था। दॉनों यऴों ऱारे एक अन्य
मभश्रण भें, 30%ऴंिय े का यऴ था। दॉनों मभश्रणों कॉ एक मनमिि अनुऩाि भें मभरामा गमा, मजऴकी
ऱजव ऴे मनमभिि नए मभश्रण भें ऴेफ के यऴ औय ऴंिय े के यऴ का अनुऩाि 4 : 3 वॉ गमा। अंतिभ मभश्रण
भें ऩवरे मभश्रण औय दऴू य े मभश्रण का क्रभानुऴाय अनुऩाि ज्ञाि कीमजए ।
Level 5 (15/06/2022) Shift 3
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Solution A contains 10% acid and sol B contains 30% acid. In what ratio should sol
A be mixed with sol B to obtain a mixture with 25% acid?
मभश्रण A भें 10% एमऴड वै िथा मभश्रण B भें 30% एमऴड वै। मभश्रण A कॉ B के ऴाथ ककऴ अनुऩाि भें
मभरामा जाए की मभश्रण भें 25% एमऴड प्राप्त वॉ जाए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A farmer wants to prepare 20 kg of fertiliser mixture containing 42% nitrogen by mixing
two types of fertilisers, A and B. Fertiliser A contains 30% nitrogen, and fertiliser B
contains 50% nitrogen. How many kilograms of each fertiliser should he mix?
एक ककऴान दॉ प्रकाय के उऱचयकों, A औय B, कॉ मभराकय 42% नाइरॉजन मुि 20 kg उऱचयक मभश्रण
िैमाय कयना चाविा वै। उऱचयक A भें 30% नाइरॉजन वै औय उऱचयक B भें 50% नाइरॉजन वै। उऴ े
मभश्रण भें प्रत्येक उऱचयक का ककिना ककरॉग्राभ मभराना चाहवए?
[RRB GROUP - D 2025]
options: 10 kg of A, 10 kg of B
6 kg of A, 14 kg of B
8 kg of A, 12 kg of B
12 kg of A, 8 kg of B
answer: 8 kg of A, 12 kg of B
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
For a chemistry experiment, Veena has 60 ml of 25% solution of ferrous sulphate.
How many millilitres of 60% solution should she add to make a 30% solution of
ferrous sulphate?
एक यऴामन कऱज्ञान प्रमॉग के मरए, ऱीना के ऩाऴ पे यऴ ऴल्फे ट के 25% कऱरमन ऱारी 60 ml भात्र
वै। पे यऴ ऴल्फे ट का 30% कऱरमन फनाने के मरए उऴभें 60% कऱरमन की ककिने मभरीरीटय भात्रा
मभराई जानी चाहवए?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL CBT-1 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
How many litres of milk with 24% concentration are to be mixed with 18 litres
with 72% concentration to get a mixture with 36% concentration?
36% ऴांद्रिा ऱारा मभश्रण प्राप्त कयन े के मरए, 24% ऴांद्रिा ऱारे ककिने रीटय दधू कॉ 72% ऴांद्रिा ऱारे 18
रीटय दधू भ ें मभरामा जाना चाहवए?
(DELHI POLICE HEAD CONSTABLE 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A 125-liter mixture of milk and water contains 25% water. How much more water
should be added to make the water content 30% in the new mixture?
125 री० दधू औय ऩानी के मभश्रण भें 25% ऩानी वै। नए मभश्रण भें जर कॉ 30% फनाने के मरए औय
ककिना जर मभराना चाहवए?
(RRB RPF SI 2024) [RRB GROUP - D 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
How much water should be added to 20 liters of a mixture containing 15%
alcohol so that the alcohol content in the mixture becomes 12%?
15% अल्कॉवर ऱारे 20 रीटय मभश्रण भें ककिना ऩानी मभराना चाहवए मजऴऴे कक मभश्रण भ ें
अल्कॉवर की भात्रा 12% वॉ जाए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
700 grams of cane sugar solution has 60% of sugar in it. How much sugar should
be added to make it 75% in the solution?
चीनी के 700 ग्राभ कऱरमन भें चीनी की भात्रा 60% वै। कऱरमन भें चीनी की भात्रा कॉ 75% कयने के
मरए इऴभें ककिनी औय चीनी मभरानी वॉगी?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL CBT-1 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A mixture of 750 kg of alloy of copper and tin contains 25% tin. How much tin
must be added so that it becomes 70% of the mixture?
िांफे औय हटन के 750 ककरॉग्राभ मभश्रधािु के मभश्रण भें 25% हटन वै। ककिना हटन मभरामा जाना
चाहवए िाकक मव मभश्रण का 70% वॉ जाए?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
The wheat sold by a grocer contained 10% low quality wheat. What quantity of good
quality wheat should be added to 150 g of wheat, so the percentage of bad quality
wheat becomes 6%?
एक ककयाना कऱक्रे िा द्वाया फेचे गए गेरॄं भ ें 10% मनम्न गणु ऱत्ता ऱारा गेरॄं था। 150 ग्राभ गेरॄं भ ें अच्छी गुणऱत्ता ऱारी
गेरॄं की ककिनी भात्रा मभरानी चाहवए, िाकक खयाफ गुणऱत्ता ऱारे गेरॄं का प्रतिलि 6% वॉ जाए?
(SSC SELECTION POST EXAM PHASE XII 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
In what ratio should water be added to pure alcohol to make it an 80% alcohol solution?
ककऴ अनुऩाि भें ऩानी भ ें लुि लयाफ कॉ जॉडा जाना चाहवए िाकक ऱॉ 80% लयाफ घॉर फन जाम?े
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
How much water must be added to 60 litres of milk at litres for ₹20 so as to
have a mixture worth ₹ a litre?
₹20 भ ें रीटय कीभि ऱारे 60 रीटय दधू भें ककिना ऩानी मभरामा जाना चाहवए कक ₹ प्रति
रीटय कीभि का मभश्रण प्राप्त वॉ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A mixture containing of ethanol is mixed with another mixture containing
a% of ethanol in the ratio . If the percentage of ethanol in the final mixture is
, find the value of .
इथेनॉर मुि एक मभश्रण कॉ इथेनॉर मुि एक अन्य मभश्रण के ऴाथ के अनुऩाि भ ें
मभरामा जािा वै। मदद अंि के मभश्रण भें इथेनॉर का प्रतिलि वै, िॉ का भान ज्ञाि कीमजए।
(SSC CHSL PRE 2025)]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
In 80 ml of a syrup, chloroquine and hydroxyl chloroquine are in ratio of 2 : 3. This
syrup is mixed with 120 ml of another syrup of chloroquine and hydroxyl
chloroquine. In the resultant syrup, chloroquine is 38.5% then find the ratio of
chloroquine and hydroxyl chloroquine in 120 ml syrup.
एक 80 मभरीरीटय मऴयऩ भें, क्लॉयॉक्वीन औय वाइड्रॉक्सिर क्लॉयॉक्वीन 2:3 के अनुऩाि भें वैं। इऴ
मऴयऩ कॉ, क्लॉयॉक्वक्वन औय वाइड्रॉक्सिर क्लॉयॉक्वक्वन के एक अन्य मऴयऩ के 120 मभरीरीटय के
ऴाथ मभरामा जािा वै। ऩहयणाभी मऴयऩ भें, क्लॉयॉक्वीन 38.5% वै, िॉ 120 मभरीरीटय मऴयऩ भें
क्लॉयॉक्वीन औय वाइड्रॉक्सिर क्लॉयॉक्वीन का अनुऩाि ज्ञाि कीमजमे।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A bottle full of whisky contains 50% alcohol. A part of this whisky is replaced by
another containing 18% alcohol and the percentage of alcohol was found to be
26%. The quantity of whisky replaced is:
लयाफ ऴे बयी फॉिर भें 50% अल्कॉवर वै। इऴ लयाफ का एक बाग 18% अल्कॉवर मुि दऴू यी लयाफ
ऴे फदरा गमा औय अल्कॉवर का प्रतिलि 26% ऩामा गमा। लयाफ का ककिना हवस्सा प्रतिस्थाकऩि
ककमा गमा
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A flask is full of 20% sulphuric acid solution. A part of this 20% sulphuric acid solution is
replaced by a 4% sulphuric acid solution and in this process 10% sulphuric acid solution
is obtained. What fraction of 20% sulphuric acid solution is replaced from the flask?
एक फ्लास्क 20% ऴल्फ्यूहयक एमऴड घॉर ऴे बया वै। इऴ 20% ऴल्फ्यूहयक एमऴड घॉर के एक बाग
कॉ 4% ऴल्फ्यूहयक एमऴड घॉर ऴे फदर ददमा जािा वै औय इऴ प्रकक्रमा भें 10% ऴल्फ्यूहयक एमऴड घॉर
प्राप्त वॉिा वै। फ्लास्क ऴे 20% ऴल्फ्यूहयक एमऴड घॉर का ककिना अंल फदरा जािा वै?
(RRB RPF SI 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
A local cinema charges ₹150 per youth ticket and ₹250 per adult ticket. One
evening, the theater sold a total of 200 tickets, collecting ₹38,000 in revenue.
Find out how many youth tickets and how many adult tickets were sold?
एक स्थानीम मऴनेभाघय भें मुऱाओ ंके मरए ₹150 प्रति हटकट औय ऱमस्कों के मरए ₹250 प्रति हटकट
की दय ऴे हटकट कफकिे वैं। एक लाभ, क्तथएटय ने कु र 200 हटकट फेचे औय ₹38,000 की कभाई की।
ज्ञाि कय ें कक ककिने मुऱाओ ंके हटकट औय ककिन े ऱमस्कों के हटकट कफके ?
[RRB Group- D 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A chemist mixes two liquids 1 and 2. One litre of liquid 1 weighs 1 kg and one litre
of liquid 2 weights 800 gm. If half litre of the mixture weights 480 gm, then the
percentage of liquid 1 in the mixture, in terms of volume, is.
एक के मभस्ट दॉ ियर ऩदाथच 1 औय 2 कॉ मभरािा वै। एक रीटय ियर 1 का ऱजन 1 ककरॉ वॉिा वै औय
एक रीटय ियर 2 का ऱजन 800 ग्राभ वॉिा वै। मदद मभश्रण के आधे रीटय का ऱजन 480 ग्राभ वै, िॉ
भात्रा के ऴंदबच भें मभश्रण भें ियर 1 का प्रतिलि वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A family of seven minors and some adults has an average wheat consumption
of 11.10 kg. The average consumption for minors is 5.5 kg per person, and for
adults, it is 16 kg per person. Find the number of adults in the family.
ऴाि नाफामरगों औय कु छ ऱमस्कों के एक ऩहयऱाय भें गेरॄं की औऴि खऩि 11.10 ककरॉग्राभ वै।
नाफामरगों के मरए औऴि खऩि 5.5 ककरॉग्राभ प्रति व्यक्ति वै, औय ऱमस्कों के मरए, मव 16
ककरॉग्राभ प्रति व्यक्ति वै। ऩहयऱाय भें ऱमस्कों की ऴंख्या ज्ञाि कीमजए।
(SSC MTS 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A rabbit on a controlled diet is fed daily 300gms of a mixture of two foods, food X
and food Y. Food X contains 10% protein and food Y contains 15% protein. If the
rabbit’s diet provides exactly 38gm of protein daily, how many grams of food X
are in the mixture.
एक खयगॉल जॉ कक ऴन्तुमरि आवाय रेिा वै प्रतिददन दॉ खाद्य ऩदाथच X औय Y के 300 ग्राभ मभश्रण
का ऴेऱन कयिा वै। ऩदाथच X भें 10% प्रॉटीन औय ऩदाथच Y भें 15% प्रॉटीन वै।मदद ख़यगॉल प्रति ददन 38
ग्राभ प्रॉटीन ग्रवण कयिा वै िॉ ज्ञाि कीमजए कक मभश्रण भें ऩदाथच X की ककिनी भात्रा वै।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Suhani pays tax at the rate of 30% on her entire income of Rs 90000 and Ritika
pays tax at the rate of 40% on her entire income of Rs y. if the overall tax rate on
their combined income comes to 37%, then what is the value of y?
ऴुवानी अऩनी 90000 रुऩमे की ऩूयी आम ऩय 30% की दय ऴे कय का बुगिान कयिी वै औय हयतिका
अऩनी y रुऩमे की ऩूयी आम ऩय 40% की दय ऴे कय का बुगिान कयिी वै। मदद उनकी ऴंमुि आम ऩय
कु र कय की दय 37% आिी वै, िॉ y का भूल्य क्या वै?
(SSC CGL 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Johns monthly expenditure is 85% of his monthly salary and Jack's monthly
expenditure is 90% of his monthly salary. Their combined expenditure is 88%. If
John's monthly salary is ₹60000, then what is the monthly salary of Jack?
जॉन का भामऴक व्यम उऴके भामऴक ऱेिन का 85% वै औय जैक का भामऴक व्यम उऴके भामऴक
ऱेिन का 90% वै। उनका ऴंमुि व्यम 88% वै। मदद जॉन का भामऴक ऱेिन ₹60000 वै, िॉ जैक का
भामऴक ऱेिन क्या वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL CBT-1 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Rishu saves x% of her income. If her income increases by 26% and the
expenditure increases by 20%, then her savings increase by 50%. What is the
value of x?
हयलु, अऩनी आम का x% फचािी वै। मदद उऴकी आम भें 26% की ऱृद्धि वॉिी वै औय व्यम भें 20% की
ऱृद्धि वॉिी वै, िॉ उऴकी फचि भें 50% की ऱृद्धि वॉिी वै। x का भान ज्ञाि कीमजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Ritu’s monthly saving are 28% of her monthly expenditure. If her monthly
income increases by 45% and the monthly expenditure increases by 54.1%, then
by what percentage do her monthly saving increase?
हयिु की भामऴक फचि उऴके भामऴक खचच का 28% वै। मदद उऴकी भामऴक आम भ ें 45% की ऱृद्धि वॉिी वै औय
भामऴक व्यम भ ें 54.1% की ऱृद्धि वॉिी वै, िॉ उऴकी भामऴक फचि भ ें ककिन े प्रतिलि की ऱृद्धि वॉिी वै?
(ICAR Technician 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A sum of Rs 41 was divided among 50 students. If each boy got 90 p and each girl
got 65 p. find the number of boys?
50 छात्रों के फीच 41 रुऩमे की यामल फांटी गई। मदद प्रत्येक रडके कॉ 90 ऩैऴे मभरिे वैं औय प्रत्येक
रडकी कॉ 65 ऩैऴे मभरिे वैं। रडकों की ऴंख्या ज्ञाि कयें?
[RRB GROUP - D 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A sum of Rs 36.90 is made up of 90 coins that are either 20 paise coins or 50 paise
coins. Find out how many 20 paise coins are there in the total amount?
36.90 रुऩमे की यामल 90 मऴक्कों ऴे फनिी वै जॉ मा िॉ 20 ऩैऴे के मऴक्के मा 50 ऩैऴे के मऴक्के वैं।
जामनए कु र ककिने 20 ऩैऴे के मऴक्के वैं?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL CBT-1 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
The population of a district is 380000, out of which 209000 are males. 56% of the
population is literate. If 83% males are literate, then what percentage of females
are literate?
एक मजरे की जनऴंख्या 380000 वै, मजऴभें ऴे 209000 ऩुरुळ वैं। 56% जनऴंख्या ऴाक्षय वै। मदद
83% ऩुरुळ ऴाक्षय वैं, िॉ ककिने प्रतिलि भहवराएूँ ऴाक्षय वैं ?
(RRB NTPC 12TH LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
In a village consisting of p persons, x% can read and write. Of the males, only y%
can read and write. Of the females, only z% can read and write. If x, y z, then
what is the number of males in the village?
एक गाूँऱ भें p व्यक्ति वैं, मजनभें ऴे x% ऩढ़ औय मरख ऴकिे वैं। ऩुरुळों भें के ऱर y% ऩढ़ औय मरख
ऴकिे वैं। भहवराओ ं भें के ऱर z% ऩढ़ औय मरख ऴकिी वैं। मदद x, y z वै, िॉ गाूँऱ भें ऩुरुळों की
ऴंख्या ककिनी वै?
(UPSC CDS -II 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two trains traveling in opposite directions pass a man standing on a platform in
54 seconds and 1.5 minutes, respectively. If they pass each other in 74 seconds,
what is the ratio of their speeds?
कऱऩयीि ददलाओ ं भें चर यवी दॉ रेनें प्लेटपॉभच ऩय खडे एक आदभी कॉ क्रभलः 54 ऴेकें ड औय 1.5
मभनट भें ऩाय कय रेिी वैं। अगय ऱे एक-दऴू य े कॉ 74 ऴेकें ड भें ऩाय कयिी वैं, िॉ उनकी गति का
अनुऩाि ककिना वॉगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
In an examination there are 150 questions and 4 marks are given for every
correct answer and 1 mark is deducted for every wrong answer. A candidate
attempted all 150 questions and scored 250 marks. Find the number of
questions he answered correctly.
एक ऩयीक्षा भें 150 प्रश्न वैं औय प्रत्येक ऴवी उत्तय के मरए 4 अंक ददए जािे वैं औय प्रत्येक गरि उत्तय के
मरए 1 अंक की कटॊिी की जािी वै। एक अभ्यथी ने ऴबी 150 प्रश्नों के उत्तय ददए औय 250 अंक प्राप्त
ककए। ज्ञाि कीमजए कक उऴने ककिने प्रश्नों के ऴवी उत्तय ददए।
[RRB Group -D 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A labourer was appointed by a contractor on the condition he would be paid
Rs.75 for each day of his work but would be fined at the rate of Rs. 15 per day for
his absent. After 20 days the contractor paid the laborer Rs.1140. the number of
days the laborer absented from work was.
एक भजदयू कॉ इऴ लिच ऩय एक ठे के दाय द्वाया मनमुि ककमा गमा था कक उऴे उऴके काभ के प्रत्येक
ददन के मरए 75 रुऩमे का बुगिान ककमा जाएगा, रेककन उऴके अनुऩस्थस्थि यवने ऩय प्रति ददन 15
रुऩमे की दय ऴे जुभाचना रगामा जाएगा | 20 ददनों के फाद ठे के दाय ने भजदयू कॉ 1140 रुऩमे का
बुगिान ककमा | ककिने ददनों भे भजदयू काभ ऴे अनुऩस्थस्थि था ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
There are some rabbits and parrots in a farmhouse. The total number of animal
heads is 180 and the total number of legs is 520. Find the number of rabbits in the
farmhouse.
एक पाभचवाउऴ भें कु छ खयगॉल औय िॉिे वैं। प्राद्धणमों के मऴयों की कु र ऴंख्या 180 औय ऩैयों की कु र
ऴंख्या 520 वै। पाभचवाउऴ भें खयगॉलों की ऴंख्या ज्ञाि कीमजए।
[RRB Group D 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
In a MCD parking there are some two wheelers and rest are 4 wheelers. If wheels
are counted, there are total 520 wheels but the in-charge of the parking told me
that there are only 175 vehicles. If no vehicle has a stepney, then the number of
two wheelers is?
एभऴीडी ऩाककिं ग भें कु छ दॉऩहवमा ऱावन वैं औय फाकी 4 ऩहवमा ऱावन वैं। मदद ऩहवमों की क्तगनिी की
जाए िॉ कु र 520 ऩहवम े वैं रेककन ऩाककिं ग प्रबायी ने भुझे फिामा कक के ऱर 175 ऱावन वैं। मदद ककऴी
ऱावन भें स्टेऩनी नवीं वै िॉ दऩु हवमा ऱावनों की ऴख्यं ा ककिनी वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
A person travels 615 km in 12 hours in two stages. In the first part of the journey, he
travels by bus at the speed of 40 km per hours. In the seconed part of the journey, he
travels by train at the speed of 55 km per hr. How much distance did he travels by bus?
एक व्यक्ति दॉ बागों भें 615 ककभी 12 घंटें भें िम कयिा वै। मात्रा के ऩवरे बाग भें ऱव 40 ककभी प्रति
घंटा की गति ऴे फऴ द्वाया िम कयिा वै िथा दऴू ये बाग भें ऱव 55 ककभी प्रति घंटा की गति ऴे रेन द्वाया
िम कयिा वै। िॉ फऴ द्वाया उऴने ककिनी दयू ी िम की ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
A certain company employed234 women and 198 men and their average wage
was Rs 30.25 per day. If a man got Rs 6 more than a woman, then what is the
daily wage of a man?
एक मनमिि कं ऩनी ने 234 भहवराओ ं औय 198 ऩुरुळों कॉ यॉजगाय ददमा औय उनका औऴि ऱेिन
30.25 रुऩमे प्रति ददन था। मदद एक ऩुरुळ कॉ एक भहवरा ऴे 6 रुऩमे अतधक मभरिे वैं, िॉ एक ऩरुु ळ
का दैमनक ऱेिन ककिना वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Tickets for one show cost Rs. 7.50 for parents and Rs. 3 for children. If an amount
of Rs. 5925 was collected from the sale of 952 tickets, then find the number of
tickets sold?
एक लॉ के हटकट का भल्यू अमबबाऱकों के मरए रु 7.50 औय फच्चों के मरए रु 3 वै। मदद कु र 952 हटकटों की
कफक्री ऴे रु 5925 की यामल एकत्र की गमी वॉ िॉ फेच े गए फच्चों की हटकटों की ऴख्यं ा ज्ञाि कीमजमे?
RRB GROUP- D 2022
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
The average score of 42 students in a test is 69. The ratio of the number of boys
to that of girls is 10 : 11. The average score of the boys is 20% more than that of the
girls. The average score of the boys is:
एक ऩयीक्षा भें 42 कऱद्याक्तथिमों के औऴि प्राप्तांक 69 वैं। रडकों की ऴंख्या का रडककमों की ऴख्यं ा ऴे
अनुऩाि 10 : 11 वै। रडकों के औऴि प्राप्तांक रडककमों के प्राप्तांकों की िुरना भें 20% अतधक वै।
रडकों के औऴि प्राप्ताकं ज्ञाि कीमजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
Tea leaves worth Rs 108 per kg and Rs 120 per kg are mixed with a third variety in
the ratio 2:3:5. If the mixture is worth Rs 125 per kg, the price (in Rs ,rounded off to
nearest integer ) of the third variety of tea leaves per kg will be?
108 रुऩमे प्रति ककरॉग्राभ औय 120 रुऩमे प्रति ककरॉग्राभ की चाम की ऩक्तत्तमों कॉ 2:3:5 के अनुऩाि
भें िीऴयी ककस्म के ऴाथ मभरामा जािा वै। मदद मभश्रण का भूल्य 125 रुऩमे प्रति ककरॉग्राभ वै, िॉ
िीऴयी ककस्म की चाम की ऩक्तत्तमों की प्रति ककरॉग्राभ कीभि (रुऩमे भें मनकटिभ ऩूणाांक िक
ऩूणाांककि ककमा गमा) क्या वॉगी? ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
In a alloy 81% copper and 19% tin. In another alloy 63% copper, 10% tin and
remaining are impurities. Both alloys are mixed such that then % of tin becomes
15%. Find the % of copper in new mixture.
एक मभश्र धािु भें 81% िांफा औय 19% हटन वै। दऴू यी मभश्र धािु भें िांफा 63% ऱ हटन 10% औय बॉल
अलुद्धिमा वै। दॉनॉ मभश्र धािुओ ंकॉ इऴ प्रकाय ऴ े मभरामा जािा वै कक नए मभश्रण भें हटन की भात्रा
15% वॉ जािी वै िॉ नए मभश्रण भें िांफे का प्रतिलि ज्ञाि कयॉ।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [B].

question:
Three classes: X, Y and Z, take a test. The average score in class X is 83 The
average score in class Y is 76 The average score in class Z is 85 The average
score of all students in classes X and Y together is 79. The average score of all
students in classes Y and Z together is 81. What is the average score for all the
three classes, taken together?
िीन क्लाऴ X, Y औय Z भें एक टेस्ट रृआ। क्लाऴ X का औऴि प्राप्तांक 83 वै। क्लाऴ Y का औऴि
प्राप्तांक 76 वै। क्लाऴ Z का औऴि प्राप्तांक 85 वै। क्लाऴ X औय Y के ऴबी छात्रों कॉ मभराकय औऴि
प्राप्तांक 79 वै। क्लाऴ Y औय Z के ऴबी छात्रों कॉ मभराकय औऴि प्राप्तांक 81 वै। िीनॉ क्लाऴॉ का
मभराकय कु र औऴि प्राप्तांक ज्ञाि कीमजमे।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [D].

question:
In a school, of the number of students are girls and the rest are boys. of the
number of boys are below 12 years of age and of the number of girls are 12
years or above 12 yeas of age. If the number of students below 12 years of age is
480, then of the total number of students in the school will be equal to:
एक स्कू र भें, छात्रों की ऴंख्या भ ें रडककमा ं वैं औय फाकी रडके वैं। रडकों की ऴंख्या का , 12 ऱळच ऴ े
कभ वै औय रडककमों की ऴंख्या का , 12 ऱळच मा 12 ऱळच ऴे अतधक वै। मदद 12 ऱळच ऴे कभ आम ु के छात्रों
की ऴंख्या 480 वै, िॉ स्कू र भें कु र छात्रों की ऴंख्या का के फयाफय वॉगा:
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].

question:
Two-third of the number of employees of a company are males and the rest are
females. If of the male employees and of the female employee are temporary
employees and the total number of permanent employees is 740, the of the total
number of the employees exceeds the number of temporary female employees by:
एक कं ऩनी के कभचचाहयमों की ऴंख्या का दॉ-तिवाई ऩरुु ळ वैं औय फाकी भहवराएं वैं। मदद ऩरुु ळ कभचचाहयमों का
औय भहवरा कभचचायी का अस्थामी कभचचायी वैं औय स्थामी कभचचाहयमों की कु र ऴंख्या 740 वै िॉ कभचचाहयमों
की कु र ऴख्यं ा का अस्थामी भहवरा कभचचाहयमों की ऴख्यं ा ऴे ककिना अतधक वै:
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [C].
